title: Permissions Secondary Audit
matrixRule: For Contractor, Employee, Supervisor, and Manager, module access requires the user's team to have the module enabled and the user's hierarchy rank to meet the module minimum. Admin and super-admin roles are full-access roles and do not depend on the team matrix.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank. Legacy direct RLS has own-user policies, but normal app module gates should block access.
byRole.Employee: Own timesheets only: create, view, update own rows, entries, and job codes. No employee/team filters.
byRole.Supervisor: Same as Employee in timesheet RLS because Supervisor is role_class employee and not is_manager_admin. In reports, helper code can treat Supervisor as manager-like if Reports access exists.
byRole.Manager: Elevated timesheet user: employee/team filters, create for others, view/update/delete all timesheets and entries via is_manager_admin RLS.
byRole.Admin: Full access and unscoped report/admin behavior.

byRole.Contractor: Own van checks: create, view, update, and delete own drafts and related items/hours/photos.
byRole.Supervisor: Own write flow plus read-all visibility for van inspections, items, daily hours, and photos via effective_is_supervisor. Not granted manager write/delete paths.
byRole.Manager: Read all; create checks for users; update/delete draft checks and manage related items/hours/photos via is_manager_admin, with workshop-team carve-outs in RLS.
byRole.Admin: Full access. Admin/super-admin bypasses the matrix and manager carve-outs.

byRole.Contractor: Own plant checks: create, view, update, and delete own drafts and related records.
byRole.Supervisor: Own write flow plus read-all visibility for plant inspections, items, daily hours, and photos. Not granted manager write/delete paths.
byRole.Manager: Read all; create checks for users; update/delete draft checks and manage related items/hours/photos via is_manager_admin, with workshop-team carve-outs in RLS.
byRole.Admin: Full access. Admin/super-admin bypasses the matrix and manager carve-outs.

byRole.Contractor: Own HGV check workflow for authored checks.
byRole.Supervisor: Own write flow plus read-all visibility for HGV inspections, items, daily hours, and photos. Not granted manager write/delete paths.
byRole.Manager: Read all; update/delete draft checks and manage related items/hours/photos via is_manager_admin, with workshop-team carve-outs in RLS.
byRole.Admin: Full access. Admin/super-admin bypasses the matrix and manager carve-outs.

byRole.Contractor: Assigned document access: view/read/sign assigned project documents and record visitor signatures where exposed.
byRole.Supervisor: Module access exists, but UI treats Supervisor as employee for management pages. RLS still reserves document/assignment management for is_manager_admin.
byRole.Manager: Manage project documents and assignments: upload/update/delete docs, view all assignments, create/update assignments, and manage document types/favourites where routes allow.
byRole.Admin: Full management, plus admin override where policies distinguish admin.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank in the current live matrix. If granted, absence secondary maps Contractor to the Employee tier.
byRole.Employee: Default secondary: see own bookings and add/edit own bookings.
byRole.Supervisor: Default secondary: see all/team/own bookings; add/edit team bookings; view team work shifts; authorise team bookings. No allowance visibility, overview/reasons tabs, work-shift edit, own edit, or own authorise by default.
byRole.Manager: Default secondary: see all/team/own bookings; add/edit team and own bookings; see team allowances; view/edit team work shifts; authorise team and own bookings. Manager-admin RLS also covers several archival/generation tables.
byRole.Admin: All absence secondary permissions true by default, including all scopes, reasons, overview, work shifts, generation/closure/admin flows.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: Can view maintenance overview/data and can reach module-based maintenance create/update APIs if exposed. Settings tab is hidden; category/recipient management remains manager/admin gated.
byRole.Manager: Can view and update maintenance plus Settings tab: categories, recipients, retired asset restore/delete UI.
byRole.Admin: Full maintenance access and settings control.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: Can pass the module gate, but message creation/reporting/export still hit manager-admin RLS or API checks. This is a current mismatch.
byRole.Manager: Create toolbox talks/reminders, manage recipients, and view reports/export compliance data.
byRole.Admin: Full access. Strict admin notification audit tools remain admin-only.

byRole.Contractor: Workshop task user flow where team-enabled: view/create workshop tasks, comments, task attachments, and attachment responses through module-based policies.
byRole.Employee: Same workshop task user flow as Contractor.
byRole.Supervisor: Same module-user workflow. Settings/template/category UI is hidden; template/category RLS remains manager-admin gated.
byRole.Manager: Module-user workflow plus manager-admin controls for categories, subcategories, templates, template versions/sections/fields, and manager comment/delete paths.
byRole.Admin: Full workshop and template administration.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: No module access by rank in the live matrix, even though Absence secondary defaults include authorise_bookings_team. This is a current matrix mismatch.
byRole.Manager: Approvals page for timesheets and absences. Absence approval scope follows secondary absence permissions, typically team and own by default.
byRole.Admin: All approvals scopes; admin/super tier bypasses team scoping.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: No module access by rank in the live matrix. Not manager-admin, so legacy actions table RLS does not grant all-row management.
byRole.Manager: Manage action/reminder workflow records, assignment directory, action settings, and fleet-inspection reminder generation.
byRole.Admin: Full action workflow control.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: No module access by rank in the live matrix. Report scope helper treats Supervisor as manager-like if access is ever granted, but current module minimum is Manager.
byRole.Manager: Can run reports. Scope is team-limited for manager-like users unless admin tier or Accounts override applies; reports also require source module access.
byRole.Admin: All report scopes and settings; admin tier bypasses report team scoping.

byRole.Contractor: Can create own suggestions and view own suggestion/update thread through general authenticated policies; no management view.
byRole.Supervisor: Manage suggestions: view all, update statuses/details, create/view suggestion updates.
byRole.Manager: Same module-level suggestion management as Supervisor.
byRole.Admin: Same plus full admin override.

byRole.Contractor: No editor access; can use normal Help/FAQ content.
byRole.Employee: No editor access; can use normal Help/FAQ content.
byRole.Supervisor: Manage FAQ categories and articles through module-based API/RLS.
byRole.Manager: Same FAQ editor management as Supervisor.
byRole.Admin: Same plus full admin override.

byRole.Contractor: Can submit error reports and view own reports/updates; no management view.
byRole.Supervisor: Manage all error reports: view/update reports and create/view report updates through module-based policies.
byRole.Manager: Same error-report management as Supervisor.
byRole.Admin: Same plus full admin override.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Manager: Can access user admin if team-enabled. Can create/update users, but can only assign employee-class non-super roles; role creation is limited to employee roles and no new permission tiers. Role edit/delete UI is admin-only.
byRole.Admin: Full user, role, hierarchy, team, and permission administration.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Manager: Can access Admin Settings when the module is enabled. Manager-level access covers layout preferences and module-gated settings surfaces; admin-only tools remain reserved for Admin/Super Admin where separately guarded.
byRole.Admin: Admin settings UI, layout preferences, timesheet exception settings, and admin-only settings tools.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: Can access Fleet overview and module-gated asset APIs where RLS permits. Settings/category UI is hidden. Some asset writes are mixed between module-based API gates and manager/admin RLS.
byRole.Manager: Fleet overview plus Settings tab and manager asset operations. Some category sections/actions remain admin-only in UI/RLS.
byRole.Admin: Full fleet/category/settings control.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Manager: View/create/update customers through module-based policies. Customer delete is admin-only.
byRole.Admin: Full customer access including admin-only delete.

byRole.Contractor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Supervisor: No module access by rank.
byRole.Manager: Create, view, update quote records, sequences, line items, workflow data where module-based. Quote/customer top-level deletes are admin-only; some legacy quote workflow tables still use is_manager_admin policies.
byRole.Admin: Full quote access including admin-only delete paths.

byRole.Contractor: Employee inventory view: set/change own location, view assigned/location inventory, request locations, move/claim items through module-based user endpoints. Direct RLS is broader on some inventory tables than the UI/API manager split.
byRole.Supervisor: Same employee inventory view. Not is_manager_admin, so no inventory manager endpoints, groups, categories, item admin, check history admin, or minor-plant management.
byRole.Manager: Full inventory manager view: items, locations, categories, groups, check intervals/history, location requests, minor-plant move/restore flows. Some delete paths are admin-only.
byRole.Admin: Full inventory manager/admin access, including admin-only delete paths.

byRole.Contractor: View/action reminders assigned to self. No reminder-action creation or assignment management.
byRole.Supervisor: Same assigned-reminder workflow. No Actions module by rank in the live matrix, so cannot create/update reminder_actions or assign reminders.
byRole.Manager: Assigned-reminder workflow plus Actions-based manager creation/update/assignment of reminder actions and workflow settings.
byRole.Admin: Full reminder/action workflow control.

prdRelevantMismatches: Approvals: Supervisor has absence authorise_team by default, but cannot access the Approvals module because the live module minimum is Manager.
Toolbox Talks: Supervisor can pass the module gate, but message creation/reports still rely on manager-admin RLS/API paths.
Fleet and Maintenance: several write/settings actions mix module checks, isManager UI flags, admin-only UI, and manager-admin RLS.
Projects: some APIs are module-gated, but UI and RLS still preserve Manager/Admin management semantics.
Work shifts: absence secondary grants Supervisor team-view intent, but work-shift RLS remains manager-admin for some team rows/templates.
Actions vs Reminders: reminders use the Actions module for manager workflow, while legacy actions-table RLS still relies on is_manager_admin.
Team overrides: Workshop affects inspection read/write scope; Accounts can elevate timesheet/report visibility for manager-like roles.
